findings.text: NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email from Callum Abbot to Napier residents, with an embedded .docx attachment named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB).
The embedded .docx was not extracted because pdfdetach and Tika are not configured in the current harness. Extraction requires a tool capable of detaching attachments from PDFs.

proposed_artifacts.content: The embedded .docx file '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' in NAP-SRC-0046 could not be extracted due to missing tooling (pdfdetach/Tika). A follow-up task is proposed to perform the extraction using a configured tool.
proposed_artifacts.title: Extraction note for NAP-SRC-0046 embedded .docx

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use pdfdetach or Apache Tika to extract the embedded .docx file '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' from source NAP-SRC-0046. The source is a PDF located at 01-sources/communications/NAP-SRC-0046 - RA Applications are now open! - RA Recruitment.pdf. Save the extracted .docx as candidate/T-B07-005/2026-27_RA_Application_Pack.docx and its extracted text as candidate/T-B07-005/2026-27_RA_Application_Pack.txt.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded .docx from NAP-SRC-0046 using pdfdetach or Tika

summary: Source NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email announcing RA applications, with an embedded .docx attachment (2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx). The extracted text confirms the attachment but does not extract the embedded .docx. The task requires pdfdetach or Tika to detach the .docx; these tools are not available in the current harness. A follow-up task is proposed to perform the extraction using a configured tool.

uncertainties.description: The content of the embedded .docx attachment is unknown; it may contain the RA application form or instructions relevant to the matter.
